verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: yzx enter starts envelope; Env matches declared tiers; Host shell untouched; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.red_first: gates executed red against the pre-delivery surface (engine absent), green at HEAD (4/4)
gate_result.enter_evidence: enter runs the command inside a live envelope: private PID namespace (probe reports pid=2), private minimal mount table, private UTS hostname yzx-envelope, tmpfs home overlay hiding ~/.claude, uid 1001 native (no privilege change).
gate_result.env_evidence: --clearenv wipes the host environment, then only declared variables are injected (--env YZX_PROBE_VAR=tier-declared observed inside; absent when not declared); --cwd sets the working directory (observed /tmp).
gate_result.shell_evidence: nu is the only default in-envelope shell (engine resolves command -v nu to its store path); /etc/passwd is byte-identical before and after envelope runs — the host login shell is never modified.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: Every assertion executes real envelopes via bwrap on this host and parses live probe JSON.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-066 is complete: envelope entry performs real namespace setup (user/pid/ipc/uts, private mounts, tmpfs home overlay), clears the host environment and injects only declared tier variables, sets the working directory, and keeps nu as the only default in-envelope shell while the host shell record stays byte-identical.
